name: KrillApp.DataPoint.Filter.DiscardAbove
title: Discard Above
description: Rejects DataPoint snapshots where the value exceeds a configured maximum threshold. When a snapshot value is greater than the threshold, it is discarded and not stored. Prevents outliers, sensor errors, or invalid high readings from entering the data store.
shortDescription: Discards snapshots with values above a configured maximum threshold.
llmPurpose: Rejects incoming DataPoint snapshots where the value exceeds a configured maximum threshold.
llmBehavior: discards snapshot if condition is true
llmCreationHints: Create a DiscardAbove filter when the user wants to reject values exceeding a maximum. Requires a numeric threshold value.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf filter node that gates incoming snapshot values

llmExamples: Discard any temperature readings above 150 degrees.
